name: C & F FINANCIAL CORP
summary: C&F Financial Corp is a bank holding company operating through C&F Bank, which provides community banking services including commercial and consumer lending, residential mortgage origination, and automobile finance installment contracts. The company offers digital banking services and operates in Virginia, with expansion into Southwest Virginia. Its segments include community banking, mortgage banking, and consumer finance (automobile loans).

products.name: Community Banking
products.description: Commercial and consumer deposit and lending services offered through C&F Bank.

products.name: Mortgage Banking
products.description: Residential mortgage loan origination and sale in the secondary market.

products.name: Automobile Finance
products.description: Consumer automobile finance installment contracts; also previously offered marine and recreational vehicle loans.

products.name: Digital Banking Services
products.description: Digital banking products and services offered to customers of C&F Bank.

partnerships.partner_name: Federal Home Loan Bank of Atlanta
partnerships.description: Source of lines of credit and funding for C&F Bank.
